description: Consolidated antiship system definitions and quantities by TO

systems.name: Destroyers and Frigates
systems.description: Surface combatant destroyers and frigates (platform group 1) - split into types 19/20/21/22 per 2026 OOB update

systems.name: Missile Patrol Boats
systems.description: Missile patrol boats (platform group 2) - split into types 16/17/18 per 2026 OOB update

systems.name: Mobile Coastal AShM Launchers
systems.description: Mobile coastal anti-ship missile launchers (platform group 4) - split into types 23 (HF) and 24 (Harpoon) per 2026 OOB update

systems.name: Kwang Hua VI Patrol Boats
systems.description: 30 Kwang Hua VI missile patrol boats, 4x HF-II each (split from former type 2)

systems.name: Tuo Chiang Corvettes
systems.description: 12 Tuo Chiang low-observable corvettes, 12 missiles each (split from former type 2)

systems.name: Anping Patrol Vessels
systems.description: 12 Anping (CGA) patrol vessels, 4x HF-II each (split from former type 2)

systems.name: Keelung-class Destroyers
systems.description: 4 Keelung-class DDs, 8x Harpoon each (split from former type 1)

systems.name: Cheng Kung Frigates
systems.description: 10 Cheng Kung FFGs, 8x HF each, HF-III primary, shared HF store (split from former type 1)

systems.name: Kang Ding Frigates
systems.description: 6 Kang Ding FFGs, 8x HF each, HF-II primary, shared HF store (split from former type 1)

systems.name: Chi Yang Frigates
systems.description: 6 Chi Yang FFs, 2x Harpoon each (split from former type 1)

systems.name: Mobile Coastal AShM Launchers (HF)
systems.description: 26 mobile coastal launchers firing HF (HF-II, shared HF store), 4 each (split from former type 4)

systems.name: Mobile Coastal AShM Launchers (Harpoon)
systems.description: 100 mobile coastal launchers firing Harpoon_Ground_II, 4 each (split from former type 4)

notes: Version 5.2: 2026 OOB breakout - type 1 (Destroyers and Frigates) split into Keelung (19), Cheng Kung (20), Kang Ding (21), Chi Yang (22); type 4 (Mobile Coastal AShM) split into HF launchers (23, 26 units) and Harpoon launchers (24, 100 units). HF-II/HF-III now share a single 'HF' store_group in the combat catalog.
Version 5.1: type 2 (Missile Patrol Boats) split into Kwang Hua VI (16), Tuo Chiang (17), and Anping (18) per the 2026 OOB update; 30/12/12 boats with 4/12/4 missiles each (312 total).
Version 5.0: types 1-6 renamed to platform-group display names per grouping spec.
Types 1, 2, 4 and 7-15 are deprecated; no default rows emitted for them (retained in the reference table for backward compat with old scenarios).
Type 99 CommandControl retained as reference only; not emitted as container row.
Default rows are now emitted by get_antiship_defaults() reading antiship_grouping_spec.json.
TOs block removed; row generation is owned by defaults_loader.py + grouping spec.
